notes: New Games tab! Play 8 games against the computer — Chess, Tic-Tac-Toe, Connect Four, Basketball, 2048, Memory Match, Rock-Paper-Scissors and Dice. Everything runs on-device (no internet needed to play), and the AI gets tougher each level you win. New twist for every game, solo or vs a friend: only the winner sees the confetti — losers get a cheeky 'defeat' animation.
